---
title: "Optimization Theory for Modelers"
subtitle: "Core Mathematics — Year 2"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Optimization Theory for Modelers

**Track**: Core Mathematics — Year 2

Optimization is the mathematical engine of model calibration, control, and machine learning. This course covers convex and nonconvex theory, variational methods, and optimal control.

## Table of Contents

1. Convex Sets and Convex Functions
2. Optimality Conditions
3. Convex Optimization Algorithms
4. Nonconvex Optimization
5. Calculus of Variations
6. Optimal Control Theory
7. Optimization on Manifolds
8. Bilevel Optimization and Learning to Optimize

---

## Chapter 1: Convex Sets and Convex Functions

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Optimality Conditions

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Convex Optimization Algorithms

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Nonconvex Optimization

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Calculus of Variations

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Optimal Control Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Optimization on Manifolds

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Bilevel Optimization and Learning to Optimize

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
